result.stdout:
-h, --help                 Shows this mesage and exits.
      --version              Prints the version to STDOUT and exits.
      --show_license         Prints the software license to STDOUT and exits.
      --show_credits         Prints the third-party notices and credits to
                               STDOUT and exits.
      --show_readme          Prints the readme to STDOUT and exits.
      --show_source          Prints the link to the source code to STDOUT and
                               exits.
      --show_supported_types Prints a list of the supported AssemblyAttributes
                               that can be migrated to STDOUT and exits.
      --project_path=VALUE   The path to the csproj to process.  If not
                               specified, tries to search for a csproj with the
                               same name as the current directory.
      --assembly_info_path=VALUE
                             The path to the AssemblyInfo.cs file.  If not
                               specified, tries to search in the Properties
                               directory in the same directory as csproj file.
      --delete_old_assembly_info
                             If specified, the old AssemblyInfo.cs file will be
                               deleted if there is nothing else remaining
                               inside of it.
      --migrate_unsupported_types
                             If specified, unsupported types will be attempted
                               to migrated by using the 'AssemblyAttribute' XML
                               element.
      --dry_run              If specified, no files will be changed, but
                               instead what will happen will be printed to
                               STDOUT.
      --no_backup            If specified, backups of the files that will be
                               changed will not be created.
      --version_source=VALUE If specified, this creates a Version tag inside of
                               the csproj.  However, the version number can
                               come from a number of attriutes.  This selects
                               which assembly attribute to grab the version
                               from.  exclude_version to not include a Version
                               tag in the csproj.  use_assembly_version to use
                               the AssemblyVersionAttribute for the Version tag
                               in the csproj.  use_file_version to use the
                               AssemblyFileVersionAttribute for the Version tag
                               in the csproj.  use_informational_version to use
                               the AssemblyInformationalVersionAttribute for
                               the Version tag in the csproj.
      --define=VALUE         Add a preprocessor define/symbol when parsing the
                               AssemblyInfo file.  Multiple defines can be
                               added.
      --assembly_company_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyCompanyAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                               migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_configuration_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyConfigurationAttribute'.  migrate (
                               default) - migrate to csproj.  delete - remove
                               from AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_copyright_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyCopyrightAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                                migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_description_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyDescriptionAttribute'.  migrate (default)
                                - migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_file_version_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyFileVersionAttribute'.  migrate (default)
                                - migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_informational_version_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyInformationalVersionAttribute'.  migrate
                               (default) - migrate to csproj.  delete - remove
                               from AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_product_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyProductAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                               migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_Title_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyTitleAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                               migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_version_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyVersionAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                               migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --neutral_resources_language_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Resources.
                               NeutralResourcesLanguageAttribute'.  migrate (
                               default) - migrate to csproj.  delete - remove
                               from AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --internals_visible_to_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Runtime.CompilerServices.
                               InternalsVisibleToAttribute'.  migrate (default)
                               - migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --com_visible_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Runtime.InteropServices.
                               ComVisibleAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                               migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_trademark_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyTrademarkAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                                migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --cls_compliant_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.CLSCompliantAttribute'. 
                               migrate (default) - migrate to csproj.  delete -
                               remove from AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj. 
                               leave - leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_guid_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Runtime.InteropServices.
                               GuidAttribute'.  migrate (default) - migrate to
                               csproj.  delete - remove from AssemblyInfo do
                               not put in csproj.  leave - leave in the
                               AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_key_file_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyKeyFileAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                               migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_key_name_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyKeyNameAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                               migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_signature_key_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblySignatureKeyAttribute'.  migrate (
                               default) - migrate to csproj.  delete - remove
                               from AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
      --assembly_culture_behavior=VALUE
                             How to handle 'System.Reflection.
                               AssemblyCultureAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
                               migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
                               AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
                               leave in the AssemblyInfo file
